block_01: 10 years like a blink of an eye
block_03: Words cannot express how much we've done over these years — but this is just the beginning. Thank you for believing in our product, contributing to its improvement, and actively participating in our progress. Cheers to all of you!
block_21: I have made some, and I have lost some. IQ Option has one of the most user friendly interfaces, and they make it much easier to trade. Thank you guys!
block_26: All I can say is that it’s an excellent app, good staff who are always willing to help at any time. Thank you very much!
block_31: I've traded since 2016. Support team has always attended to my complaints or troubles when I reach out for assistance... so 5 stars.
block_35: The best platform I ever used
block_36: Graphics are great, especially the stoploss and takeprofit tools. It is best for forex traders.
